title: peppery creamy slovakian meal pilaf
description: a hearty, gluten-free pilaf dish with a spicy kick and rich, creamy flavor, featuring black olives and a crunchy crumb topping
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the gluten-free rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the ground caraway, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the black olives and stir to combine.
Pour in the heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 15-20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the grated cheddar cheese until melted and well combined.
Transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and top with crushed gluten-free crackers and a dollop of sour cream.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
Let the pilaf rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
Reheat the pilaf in the microwave or oven if necessary.
